title: Sample Projects of Roger Delisle
hlp1: Upload a document or image and receive AI‑driven answers and insights.
hlp2: Simulates and visualizes delivery routes, vehicles, and logistics operations for analysis and testing.
hlp3: Models elevator operations in a high‑rise tower, allowing users to select floors and observe real‑time movement.
hlp4: Simulates subway network operations, including trains, stations, routing, and scheduling in an interactive environment.
hlp5: Provides CRUD functionality and interactive tools for exploring multiple military site datasets (BCATP, Navy, DEW Line, etc.).
hlp6: Enables users to query detailed information about Canada’s military bases, aircraft, ships, and historical sites.
hlp7: Offers a web interface for accessing and navigating multiple military site datasets (BCATP, Navy, DEW Line, etc.).
hlp8: A sliding‑tile puzzle where users rearrange and flip image segments to restore the original picture.
hlp9: A web application for managing, searching, and analyzing historical military datasets.
hlp10: A two‑player, space‑themed Battleship game where players locate and destroy each other’s hidden ships.
warning: All applications are hosted on the Azure Free Tier and may require a few seconds to load.
